common.nameLong: Blood on the Clocktower Script Viewer

footer.notAffiliated: This website is not affiliated with The Pandemonium Institute.
footer.descriptionsNotice: Character icons and descriptions are the property of Steven Medway and The Pandemonium Institute.
footer.translatedByMachine: Help replace machine translations by {externalLink}creating an issue on GitHub{/externalLink}.

script.title: {title}
script.nightOrderWarning: The following characters are referenced in the night order, but are not listed on the script: {characters}

base3.title: Base 3
base3.description: Official scripts provided by The Pandemonium Institute.

carousel.title: Carousel Collection
carousel.description: Community-created scripts that show off the characters released in the Carousel.

wc25.title: World Cup 2025
wc25.description: Scripts included in the 2025 World Cup competition with special rules that change the game.

s2.title: Streamer Stack
s2.description: A collection of scripts from some of your favourite Clocktower streamers and their communities that utilizes many of the characters available since the Carousel has been released!

v.title: Various
v.description: Scripts that I've collected on my travels. This is not in any way a “best of” list.

month.title: Script of the Month
month.description: The featured scripts of the month in the official app.

errors.notFoundDescription: Check for curses, or go {link}back to home{/link}.
errors.genericErrorDescription: There must be a goblin in the code
errors.largePayloadDescription: The URL contains more data than is reasonable for a script. If the script contains encoded character icons, then these should be uploaded to an external service.
errors.unknownCharacterDescription: The character "{id}" is not currently known by this website.
errors.unknownLocaleDescription: This website does not support the {locale} locale.
errors.decodingDescription: There was an error decoding the script from the URL.
errors.encodingDescription: There was an error encoding the script to put in the URL.
errors.invalidJsonDescription: The script was not valid JSON.
errors.invalidScriptDescription: The script has an issue preventing this website from working.
errors.requestFailedDescription: The request to {url} failed. If this keeps occurring, try downloading the script JSON yourself and uploading it.
